menuDownloader.title: рџ“Ґ MENU DOWNLOADER
menuDownloader.content:
в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—

в•­в”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *YOUTUBE* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}ytsearch <query>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}ytsearch lathi
в”‚
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}ytmp3 <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}ytmp3 https://youtu.be/xxx
в”‚
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}ytmp4 <url> [quality]
в”‚   *Quality:* 144, 240, 360, 480, 720, 1080
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}ytmp4 https://youtu.be/xxx 720
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *TIKTOK* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}tiktok <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}tiktok https://tiktok.com/xxx
в”‚
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}tiktokmp3 <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}tiktokmp3 https://tiktok.com/xxx
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *INSTAGRAM* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}ig <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}ig https://instagram.com/p/xxx
в”‚
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}igstory <username>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}igstory jokowi
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *FACEBOOK* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}fb <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}fb https://facebook.com/xxx
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *TWITTER* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}twitter <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}twitter https://twitter.com/xxx
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *SPOTIFY* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}spotify <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}spotify https://open.spotify.com/xxx
в”‚
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}spotifysearch <query>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}spotifysearch lathi
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂгЂЊ *SOUNDCLOUD* гЂЌ
в”‚ вЂў {usedPrefix}soundcloud <url>
в”‚   *Contoh:* {usedPrefix}soundcloud https://soundcloud.com/xxx
в”‚
